recipes.name: ຕົ້ມຍຳກຸ້ງ
recipes.description: Classic Thai hot and sour soup with shrimp

preparationSteps.title: Prep Aromatics
preparationSteps.instruction: ຊອຍຂ່າ, ຕະໄຄ້, ໃບໝາກກູດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Slice galangal, cut lemongrass into 2-inch pieces and bruise, tear lime leaves.

preparationSteps.title: Create Broth
preparationSteps.instruction: ຕົ້ມນ້ຳກັບເຄື່ອງແກງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Bring 4 cups water to boil. Add galangal, lemongrass, lime leaves. Simmer 5 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Add Vegetables
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມເຫັດ ແລະ ໝາກເລັ່ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add mushrooms and tomatoes. Cook for 3 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Cook Shrimp
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມກຸ້ງ ຕົ້ມຈົນສຸກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add shrimp and chilies. Cook until shrimp turns pink, about 3-4 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Season
preparationSteps.instruction: ປຸງລົດຊາດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Remove from heat. Add fish sauce and lime juice. Taste and adjust. Garnish with coriander.

recipes.name: ຕົ້ມຂ່າໄກ່
recipes.description: Creamy Thai coconut chicken soup

preparationSteps.title: Prep Ingredients
preparationSteps.instruction: ຊອຍໄກ່ ແລະ ເຄື່ອງແກງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Slice chicken breast. Prepare galangal, lemongrass, and tear lime leaves.

preparationSteps.title: Simmer Coconut
preparationSteps.instruction: ຕົ້ມກະທິກັບເຄື່ອງແກງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat coconut milk with galangal, lemongrass, and lime leaves. Simmer 5 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Cook Chicken
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມໄກ່ ຕົ້ມຈົນສຸກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add chicken and mushrooms. Cook until chicken is done, about 8 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Season
preparationSteps.instruction: ປຸງລົດຊາດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add fish sauce, sugar, lime juice. Adjust to taste. Add chilies if desired.

recipes.name: ແກງຂຽວຫວານໄກ່
recipes.name_th: แกงเขียวหวานไก่
recipes.name_jp: グリーンカレーチキン
recipes.description: Thai green curry with chicken and vegetables

preparationSteps.title: Fry Curry Paste
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດພິກແກງກັບກະທິ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat 1/2 cup coconut cream. Add curry paste and fry until fragrant, about 3 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Cook Chicken
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມໄກ່ ຜັດໃຫ້ສຸກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add chicken pieces. Stir-fry until chicken changes color, about 5 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Add Coconut Milk
preparationSteps.instruction: ເທກະທິທີ່ເຫຼືອ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add remaining coconut milk. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Season & Finish
preparationSteps.instruction: ປຸງລົດ ເພີ່ມໃບກະເພົາ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add fish sauce, palm sugar, lime leaves, chilies. Stir in basil leaves. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: ລາບໝູ
recipes.description: Traditional Lao/Thai minced pork salad with herbs and lime

preparationSteps.title: Cook Pork
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດໝູສັບໃຫ້ສຸກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Dry-fry minced pork in a pan until fully cooked, breaking up lumps. No oil needed.

preparationSteps.title: Make Dressing
preparationSteps.instruction: ປຸງນ້ຳຍຳ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Mix fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, and crushed chilies in a bowl.

preparationSteps.title: Combine
preparationSteps.instruction: ປະສົມທຸກຢ່າງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Toss warm pork with dressing. Add onion and herbs. Mix well and serve immediately with sticky rice.

recipes.name: ລາບໄກ່
recipes.description: Traditional minced chicken salad with herbs and lime

preparationSteps.title: Cook Chicken
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດໄກ່ສັບໃຫ້ສຸກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Dry-fry minced chicken until fully cooked, breaking up lumps.

preparationSteps.title: Mix & Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ປະສົມເຄື່ອງປຸງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Toss with fish sauce, lime juice, chilies, onion, and herbs. Serve with sticky rice.

recipes.name: ສົ້ມຕຳໄທ
recipes.description: Spicy green papaya salad - Thai style with peanuts and dried shrimp

preparationSteps.title: Prepare Papaya
preparationSteps.instruction: ຂູດໝາກຫຸ່ງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Peel and shred green papaya into thin strips. Soak in cold water.

preparationSteps.title: Pound Base
preparationSteps.instruction: ຕຳກະທຽມ ພິກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: In mortar, pound garlic and chilies until crushed. Add palm sugar, pound to mix.

preparationSteps.title: Add Papaya
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມໝາກຫຸ່ງ ຕຳ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add tomatoes, drained papaya. Pound and mix, adding fish sauce and lime juice.

preparationSteps.title: Taste & Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ຊີມລົດ ແລ້ວເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Taste and adjust. Serve with cabbage and sticky rice.

recipes.name: ຜັດໄທ
recipes.description: Classic Thai stir-fried rice noodles

preparationSteps.title: Soak Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ແຊ່ເສັ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 30 minutes until pliable. Drain.

preparationSteps.title: Make Sauce
preparationSteps.instruction: ປະສົມຊອດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Mix fish sauce, palm sugar, and vinegar until sugar dissolves.

preparationSteps.title: Stir-fry Protein
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດກຸ້ງ ແລະ ໄຂ່
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat wok with oil. Fry garlic, add shrimp until pink. Push aside. Scramble eggs.

preparationSteps.title: Add Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມເສັ້ນ ຜັດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add noodles and sauce. Toss quickly over high heat until noodles are coated and cooked.

preparationSteps.title: Finish
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມຖົ່ວງອກ ເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add bean sprouts, toss briefly. Serve with lime wedges and crushed peanuts.

recipes.name: ເຂົ້າຜັດ
recipes.description: Classic fried rice with egg and vegetables

preparationSteps.title: Prep
preparationSteps.instruction: ກຽມເຄື່ອງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Break up cold rice. Mince garlic, dice onion and tomato.

preparationSteps.title: Fry Egg
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດໄຂ່
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat oil in wok over high heat. Scramble egg, break into pieces.

preparationSteps.title: Fry Rice
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດເຂົ້າ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add garlic and onion. Stir-fry 30 seconds. Add rice, stir-fry 3-4 minutes until hot.

preparationSteps.title: Season
preparationSteps.instruction: ປຸງລົດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add soy sauce, toss well. Add tomato briefly. Serve with cucumber slices.

recipes.name: ເຂົ້າຜັດກະເພົາ
recipes.name_en: Basil Fried Rice (Khao Pad Kra Pao)
recipes.name_th: ข้าวผัดกะเพรา
recipes.description: Spicy Thai basil fried rice

preparationSteps.title: Fry Aromatics
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດກະທຽມ ພິກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat oil in wok. Fry garlic and chilies until fragrant, about 30 seconds.

preparationSteps.title: Cook Meat
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດໝູ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add minced pork. Stir-fry until cooked through, breaking up lumps.

preparationSteps.title: Add Rice
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມເຂົ້າ ຜັດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add rice. Stir-fry on high heat, mixing well with meat.

preparationSteps.title: Season & Finish
preparationSteps.instruction: ປຸງລົດ ເພີ່ມກະເພົາ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add fish sauce, soy sauce, sugar. Toss in basil leaves. Serve with fried egg.

recipes.name: ຜັດຂີ້ເມົາ
recipes.description: Spicy Thai stir-fried wide noodles with basil

preparationSteps.title: Prep Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ກຽມເສັ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: If using dried noodles, soak in warm water until pliable. Drain and separate.

preparationSteps.title: Stir-fry Base
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດກະທຽມ ພິກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat oil in wok. Fry garlic and chilies until fragrant. Add chicken, cook through.

preparationSteps.title: Add Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມເສັ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add noodles, sauces. Toss on high heat, coating noodles evenly.

preparationSteps.title: Finish
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມກະເພົາ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add tomato and basil leaves. Toss briefly and serve immediately.

recipes.name: ປີ້ງໄກ່
recipes.description: Lao-style grilled marinated chicken

preparationSteps.title: Make Marinade
preparationSteps.instruction: ເຮັດນ້ຳໝັກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Pound garlic, coriander root, pepper into paste. Mix with fish sauce, soy sauce, sugar, oil.

preparationSteps.title: Marinate
preparationSteps.instruction: ໝັກໄກ່
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Coat chicken with marinade. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours or overnight.

preparationSteps.title: Grill
preparationSteps.instruction: ປີ້ງໄກ່
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Grill over medium heat, turning occasionally, until cooked through and charred, about 25-30 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Rest & Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ພັກໄກ່ ແລ້ວເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Let rest 5 minutes. Serve with sticky rice and jaew (dipping sauce).

recipes.name: ຄໍໝູຍ່າງ
recipes.description: Grilled marinated pork neck - a popular Thai beer snack

preparationSteps.title: Make Marinade
preparationSteps.instruction: ເຮັດນ້ຳໝັກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Pound garlic, coriander root, pepper into paste. Mix with oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil.

preparationSteps.title: Marinate
preparationSteps.instruction: ໝັກຊີ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Coat pork with marinade. Marinate at least 30 minutes or overnight.

preparationSteps.title: Grill
preparationSteps.instruction: ປີ້ງຊີ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Grill over high heat until caramelized and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes per side.

preparationSteps.title: Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Slice and serve with jaew dipping sauce and sticky rice.

recipes.name: ເຝີໄກ່
recipes.description: Vietnamese chicken noodle soup

preparationSteps.title: Char Aromatics
preparationSteps.instruction: ຈູດຫອມ ຂິງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Char onion and ginger over open flame or under broiler until blackened.

preparationSteps.title: Make Broth
preparationSteps.instruction: ຕົ້ມນ້ຳຊຸບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Simmer chicken with charred aromatics in 6 cups water for 30 minutes. Skim foam.

preparationSteps.title: Shred Chicken
preparationSteps.instruction: ຈີກໄກ່
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Remove chicken, shred meat, discard bones. Season broth with fish sauce and sugar.

preparationSteps.title: Cook Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ຕົ້ມເສັ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Cook noodles according to package. Drain and divide into bowls.

preparationSteps.title: Assemble
preparationSteps.instruction: ຈັດໃສ່ຖ້ວຍ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Top noodles with chicken. Ladle hot broth over. Serve with fresh herbs and lime.

recipes.name: ໝູທອດກະທຽມ
recipes.name_th: หมูทอดกระเทียม
recipes.description: Crispy fried pork with garlic and pepper

preparationSteps.title: Marinate Pork
preparationSteps.instruction: ໝັກໝູ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Mix pork with half the garlic, soy sauce, fish sauce, pepper, and sugar. Marinate 15 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Fry Garlic
preparationSteps.instruction: ທອດກະທຽມ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat oil in wok. Fry remaining garlic until golden. Remove and set aside.

preparationSteps.title: Fry Pork
preparationSteps.instruction: ທອດໝູ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Fry marinated pork in batches until golden and cooked through, about 3-4 minutes per batch.

preparationSteps.title: Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Top with crispy garlic. Serve with steamed rice and chili sauce.

recipes.name: ເສັ້ນຜັດ
recipes.description: Simple stir-fried noodles with vegetables

preparationSteps.title: Boil Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ຕົ້ມເສັ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Cook noodles according to package until al dente. Drain and rinse.

preparationSteps.title: Stir-fry
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat oil in wok. Fry garlic, scramble egg. Add cabbage, stir-fry 2 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Add Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມເສັ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add noodles and sauces. Toss on high heat until well combined and heated through.

recipes.name: ຜັກບົ໋ງໄຟແດງ
recipes.name_en: Pak Boong Fai Daeng (Stir-Fried Morning Glory)
recipes.name_th: ผักบุ้งไฟแดง
recipes.description: Wok-fried water spinach with garlic and chilies

preparationSteps.title: Prep
preparationSteps.instruction: ກຽມຜັກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Wash morning glory. Cut into 3-inch pieces. Smash garlic and bruise chilies.

preparationSteps.title: High Heat Fry
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດໄຟແດງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat wok until smoking. Add oil, garlic, chilies. Add morning glory immediately.

preparationSteps.title: Season & Toss
preparationSteps.instruction: ປຸງລົດ ຜັດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add sauces and sugar. Toss vigorously for 1-2 minutes until just wilted. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: ແກງຈືດໝູສັບ
recipes.name_en: Gaeng Jued (Clear Soup with Minced Pork)
recipes.name_th: แกงจืดหมูสับ
recipes.name_jp: ゲーンジュートムーサップ
recipes.description: Light Thai clear soup with pork meatballs and vegetables

preparationSteps.title: Make Meatballs
preparationSteps.instruction: ປັ້ນລູກຊີ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Mix minced pork with half the garlic and pepper. Form into small balls.

preparationSteps.title: Make Broth
preparationSteps.instruction: ຕົ້ມນ້ຳຊຸບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Bring 4 cups water to boil with remaining garlic. Add meatballs, cook 5 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Add Vegetables
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມຜັກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add cabbage. Season with fish sauce and soy sauce. Simmer until vegetables are tender.

preparationSteps.title: Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Garnish with coriander and pepper. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: ຍຳວຸ້ນເສັ້ນ
recipes.name_th: ยำวุ้นเส้น
recipes.description: Spicy Thai glass noodle salad with shrimp and pork

preparationSteps.title: Soak Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ແຊ່ວຸ້ນເສັ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Soak glass noodles in warm water until soft. Drain.

preparationSteps.title: Cook Proteins
preparationSteps.instruction: ຕົ້ມກຸ້ງ ໝູ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Blanch shrimp and cook minced pork in boiling water. Drain.

preparationSteps.title: Make Dressing
preparationSteps.instruction: ປະສົມນ້ຳຍຳ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Mix fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, and crushed chilies.

preparationSteps.title: Toss & Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ປະສົມ ເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Toss noodles with proteins, vegetables, and dressing. Garnish with coriander.

recipes.name: ນ້ຳຕົກ
recipes.description: Grilled beef salad with mint and lime - named for the juice dripping like waterfall

preparationSteps.title: Grill Beef
preparationSteps.instruction: ປີ້ງຊີ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Grill beef to medium-rare, about 3-4 minutes per side. Let rest 5 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Slice Beef
preparationSteps.instruction: ຊອຍຊີ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Slice beef against the grain into thin strips.

preparationSteps.title: Make Dressing
preparationSteps.instruction: ປະສົມນ້ຳຍຳ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Mix fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, and crushed chilies.

preparationSteps.title: Toss & Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ປະສົມ ເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Toss warm beef with dressing, onion, and herbs. Serve immediately with sticky rice.

recipes.name: ແກງແດງ
recipes.description: Thai red curry with chicken and bamboo shoots

preparationSteps.title: Fry Curry Paste
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດພິກແກງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat 1/2 cup coconut cream. Add curry paste and fry until fragrant and oil separates.

preparationSteps.title: Cook Chicken
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມໄກ່
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add chicken. Stir-fry until chicken changes color, about 4 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Add Coconut Milk
preparationSteps.instruction: ເທກະທິ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add remaining coconut milk. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Season & Finish
preparationSteps.instruction: ປຸງລົດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add fish sauce, palm sugar, lime leaves, chilies. Stir in basil. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: ແກງມັດສະໝັ່ນ
recipes.name_th: แกงมัสมั่น
recipes.description: Rich Thai curry with beef, potatoes, and peanuts

preparationSteps.title: Fry Paste
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດພິກແກງ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat coconut cream. Add curry paste and fry until fragrant, about 3 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Brown Beef
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດຊີ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add beef cubes. Stir-fry until browned on all sides.

preparationSteps.title: Simmer
preparationSteps.instruction: ຕຸ໋ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add remaining coconut milk and water to cover. Simmer for 30 minutes until beef is tender.

preparationSteps.title: Add Vegetables
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມຜັກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add onion. Cook until soft, about 10 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Season
preparationSteps.instruction: ປຸງລົດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add fish sauce, palm sugar, tamarind. Adjust taste and serve with rice.

recipes.name: ຜັດຊີອິ໊ວ
recipes.description: Thai stir-fried wide rice noodles with soy sauce

preparationSteps.title: Prep Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ກຽມເສັ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Separate fresh noodles gently. If using dried, soak until pliable.

preparationSteps.title: Stir-fry Protein
preparationSteps.instruction: ຜັດໄກ່ ໄຂ່
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat oil in wok. Fry garlic, add chicken until cooked. Push aside. Scramble egg.

preparationSteps.title: Add Noodles
preparationSteps.instruction: ເພີ່ມເສັ້ນ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Add noodles and broccoli. Add sauces and sugar. Toss on high heat.

preparationSteps.title: Char & Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ໃຫ້ໄຫມ້ເລັກນ້ອຍ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Let noodles char slightly on bottom for smoky flavor. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: ປໍເປ໊ຍທອດ
recipes.name_th: ปอเปี๊ยะทอด
recipes.description: Crispy fried spring rolls with pork and vegetable filling

preparationSteps.title: Make Filling
preparationSteps.instruction: ເຮັດໄສ້
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Mix pork, noodles, vegetables, garlic, fish sauce, and pepper. Let sit 10 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Roll
preparationSteps.instruction: ມ້ວນປໍເປ໊ຍ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Place filling on wrapper. Fold sides in, roll tightly. Seal edge with water.

preparationSteps.title: Fry
preparationSteps.instruction: ທອດ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat oil to 170°C. Fry rolls in batches until golden brown, about 4-5 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Drain on paper towels. Serve hot with sweet chili sauce.

recipes.name: ໄກ່ທອດ
recipes.description: Crispy Thai-style fried chicken

preparationSteps.title: Make Marinade
preparationSteps.instruction: ເຮັດນ້ຳໝັກ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Pound garlic, coriander root, pepper into paste. Mix with fish sauce and soy sauce.

preparationSteps.title: Marinate
preparationSteps.instruction: ໝັກໄກ່
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Coat chicken with marinade. Marinate at least 30 minutes or overnight.

preparationSteps.title: Fry
preparationSteps.instruction: ທອດໄກ່
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Heat oil to 170°C. Fry chicken in batches until golden and cooked through, 12-15 minutes.

preparationSteps.title: Serve
preparationSteps.instruction: ເສີບ
preparationSteps.instruction_en: Drain on paper towels. Serve with sweet chili sauce and sticky rice.
